coculture_LD.name: MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD (diel periodic)
coculture_LD.functional_description: Enriched for photosystem I and II components including genes psbA, psaA, and psaB. Also includes genes involved in the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, and glycogen metabolism.
coculture_LD.temporal_pattern: Genes show 24-h periodicity in coculture under diel light:dark cycle but lose periodicity under extended darkness. More transcripts exhibit 24-h periodicity in coculture than in pure culture during the diel cycle.
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: High confidence based on transcriptome periodicity analysis and pathway enrichment.

supporting_quotes.quote: More Prochlorococcus transcripts exhibited 24-h periodic oscillations in coculture than in pure culture, both over the normal diel cycle and after the shift to extended darkness.

The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.
Transcripts associated with a variety of metabolic pathways, including the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.name: MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (periodic across conditions)
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.functional_description: Includes transcripts associated with the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis, indicating maintenance of metabolic functionality across diel and extended darkness conditions in coculture.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.temporal_pattern: Genes exhibit 24-h periodicity in coculture both under diel light:dark cycle and extended darkness, but not in axenic cultures under extended darkness.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.expression_dynamics: periodic across all conditions in coculture
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Moderate confidence; specific enrichment p-values not reported but supported by transcript abundance patterns.

supporting_quotes.quote: Transcripts from 13% of all Alteromonas genes exhibited 24-h periodicity when grown on a diel L:D cycle in coculture with Prochlorococcus.
Subsets of the Prochlorococcus transcriptome exhibited periodic oscillations under different combinations of culture conditions, including those that oscillated under all conditions.
Transcripts associated with a variety of metabolic pathways, including the Calvin cycle, glycolysis, fatty acid biosynthesis, glycogen metabolism, and photosynthesis.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: No explicit enrichment p-values provided for this cluster; inference based on transcript patterns.

coculture_darkness.name: MIT1002 cluster coculture_darkness (not periodic)
coculture_darkness.temporal_pattern: Genes do not exhibit significant 24-h periodicity under extended darkness in axenic cultures; periodicity largely lost in darkness except for a small subset in coculture.

supporting_quotes.quote: Only 6% of transcripts exhibited 24-h periodicity through the first 13 h of extended darkness in axenic cultures.
Prochlorococcus transcriptomes lost their synchrony within 5 h of extended darkness and reflected changes in stress responses and metabolic functions consistent with growth cessation.
